scripts.build:libs: ng build design-system && ng build auth-sso && ng build analytics-sdk && ng build market-data-client
scripts.build:all: npm run build:libs && ng build accounts-dashboard && ng build transfers
scripts.test:all: npm run build:libs && ng test design-system --watch=false --browsers=ChromeHeadless && ng test auth-sso --watch=false --browsers=ChromeHeadless && ng test analytics-sdk --watch=false --browsers=ChromeHeadless && ng test market-data-client --watch=false --browsers=ChromeHeadless && ng test accounts-dashboard --watch=false --browsers=ChromeHeadless && ng test transfers --watch=false --browsers=ChromeHeadless
scripts.lint:all: ng lint design-system && ng lint auth-sso && ng lint analytics-sdk && ng lint market-data-client && ng lint accounts-dashboard && ng lint transfers
scripts.ci: npm run lint:all && npm run build:all && npm run test:all
